content_body: Visit Blanche Manor in Winter, Spring, Summer, and Fall for year-round horseback riding adventures in Tennessee and north Georgia! Located just 15 minutes from Blue Ridge in Copperhill, TN, this family friendly actvity is the perfect activity for your North GA vacation. Envision the rolling Blue Ridge Mountains where you can saddle up to canter through a shady forest trail or embark into a snowy winter wonderland.
title: Blanche Manor
